---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
author: "`r params$report_author`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    code_folding: hide
params:
  # Engine flag: TRUE only when this template is stitched into the
  # combined report (set by the parent). Leave false for normal renders.
  combined_mode: false
  # Master Data Path (one row per trial stage)
  data_path: !r here::here("1_data", "master_sample_flow.csv")

  # Variables
  stage_var: "stage"   # stage name (order in the file = top-to-bottom of flow)
  n_var: "n"           # participant count at that stage
  arm_var: "arm"       # optional: post-randomization arm ("" = spine). Leave "" to disable.
  note_var: "note"     # optional: exclusion / attrition note ("" = none). Leave "" to disable.

  # Policy-Facing Labels
  metric_name: "Participant Flow"

  # --- Report Text (all editable; leave "" to use the smart default) ---
  report_title: "Trial Profile: CONSORT Flow Diagram"
  report_author: "Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi"
  chart_title: ""
  chart_subtitle: ""
  source_note: "Generated via CERP Analytics Template"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = !isTRUE(params$combined_mode),
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev.args = list(bg = "#FAF9F6"),
  fig.path = paste0(here::here("4_output", "figures"), "/"),
  fig.width = 11,
  fig.height = 6.5,
  fig.retina = 3
)
```

```{r cerp-style, echo=FALSE, results='asis', eval=!isTRUE(params$combined_mode)}
cat("<style>", readr::read_file(here::here("2_R", "cerp_style.css")), "</style>")
```

```{r load-and-prep}
library(tidyverse)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

# Load data (headers/values whitespace-scrubbed) and validate YAML params.
# All layout + drawing lives in viz_consort_flow() (2_R/2.6_viz_functions.R).
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)
cerp_validate(raw_data, params[grepl("_var$", names(params))])

# Size fig.height below from the number of stages actually present.
n_stages <- dplyr::n_distinct(stringr::str_squish(as.character(raw_data[[params$stage_var]])))
```


```{r plot-consort, fig.height=max(4.5, 1 + 1.15 * n_stages)}
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.6_viz_functions.R"), local = TRUE)

# Thin wrapper: map the YAML params into viz_consort_flow() and print the ggplot.
viz_consort_flow(
  data           = raw_data,
  stage_var      = params$stage_var,
  n_var          = params$n_var,
  arm_var        = params$arm_var,
  note_var       = params$note_var,
  metric_name    = params$metric_name,
  chart_title    = params$chart_title,
  chart_subtitle = params$chart_subtitle,
  source_note    = params$source_note
)
```
